name: romance-spicy
label: Spicy Romance Production (Multi-Stage)
description: Spicy romance manuscript production (Heat Level 4, explicit on-page intimacy), ported from the n8n 'Romance Book Writer' workflow. Per chapter: Scene Brief -> First Draft -> Improvement Plan -> Rewrite -> Humanize -> Intimacy (HL4), then a completion report. Assumes the book already has a chapter outline, character bible, and world guide. Each generative step is its own reusable BookClaw skill. Per-step models via OpenRouter: Scene Brief on claude-opus-4.8, First Draft on claude-opus-4.8, the Improvement Plan/Rewrite critique loop on gemini-3-pro, and the Humanize/Intimacy passes on claude-sonnet-4.6.

steps.label: Scene Brief — Chapter {{n}}
steps.promptTemplate: Create the SCENE BRIEF for Chapter {{n}} of "{{title}}". Follow your spicy-romance scene-brief methodology (in your context). Use the chapter outline, character bible, world guide, and the previous chapter's text in your context. This is a Heat Level 4 spicy romance: mark any on-page intimate scene per your methodology. Output the scene brief only — a blueprint, not the prose.

steps.label: First Draft — Chapter {{n}}
steps.promptTemplate: Write the COMPLETE Chapter {{n}} of "{{title}}" based exclusively on the scene brief in your context. Follow your spicy-romance first-draft methodology, the style guide, and the genre guide in your context. Target about {{wordsPerChapter}} words of prose. Honor the brief's heat handling for any on-page intimate scene. Output the chapter prose only, in Markdown.

steps.label: Improvement Plan — Chapter {{n}}
steps.promptTemplate: Critique the Chapter {{n}} draft of "{{title}}" in your context against its scene brief. Follow your spicy-romance improvement-plan methodology. Produce a prioritized, line-by-line improvement plan with specific before/after examples and an AI-writing score. Output the critique only — do not rewrite the chapter.

steps.label: Rewrite — Chapter {{n}}
steps.promptTemplate: Apply the improvement plan in your context to the Chapter {{n}} draft of "{{title}}" with surgical accuracy. Follow your spicy-romance rewrite methodology: change only what the plan flags, preserve voice, POV and every plot beat, keep the chapter at least {{wordsPerChapter}} words, and remove every forbidden word and em dash. Output the complete revised chapter only, in Markdown.

steps.label: Humanize — Chapter {{n}}
steps.promptTemplate: Perform the de-AI / anti-AI-detection final polish on the revised Chapter {{n}} of "{{title}}" in your context. Follow your humanizer methodology in a single pass: strip AI tells, vary rhythm, remove Oxford commas and em dashes, and remove every word from the forbidden-words list. Preserve all dialogue, Markdown, plot and meaning exactly. Output the polished chapter prose only, in Markdown.

steps.label: Intimacy — Chapter {{n}}
steps.promptTemplate: Process the Chapter {{n}} prose of "{{title}}" in your context for spicy-romance intimacy. Follow your Heat Level 4 intimacy methodology: if the chapter has no intimate content, return it unchanged; otherwise enhance and expand the intimate passages explicitly on-page (HL4) — emotional filter, physical accuracy, sensory layering, consent and care — without crossing into erotica. Preserve POV, voice and all non-intimate content. Output the complete chapter prose only, in Markdown — no commentary.

steps.label: Compile manuscript report
steps.promptTemplate: Generate a completion report for the spicy romance manuscript "{{title}}". Total chapters: {{chapterCount}}, target ~{{wordsPerChapter}} words each. Assess the romance arc's progression, voice consistency, the Heat Level 4 intimacy balance across the book, continuity, and any chapters that warrant a human editing pass. End with concrete next steps (beta readers, professional edit, formatting).
